[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 01101101 5
1 01101000 3
2 01101000 3
3 11011111 7
4 11010010 4
5 11000011 4
6 10111001 5
7 01101000 3

01 10 11111111 a
12 21 01101101 5 match 0
23 32 01101000 3 match 1 2 7
34 43 11111111 a
45 54 11011111 7 match 3
56 65 10101111 6
67 76 11111111 a
70 07 11011111 7 match 3

02 20 11111111 a
13 31 01101101 5 match 0
24 42 11111111 a
35 53 01101101 5 match 0
46 64 11111111 a
57 75 11011101 6
60 06 11111111 a
71 17 11111101 7

14 41 11111111 a
25 52 01101101 5 match 0
36 63 11101110 6
47 74 11011111 7 match 3
50 05 11011111 7 match 3
61 16 11101111 7
72 27 11111001 6

04 40 11011111 7 match 3
15 51 01101101 5 match 0
26 62 11101110 6
37 73 11111001 6
